confidenceReason: The endpoint index makes the population countable; each entry was checked.

criteriaResults.rationale: Two of fourteen indexed mutation endpoints lack replay semantics.
Twelve endpoints are fully specified and the absences are countable.

ratingDrivers.description: Two mutation endpoints have no replay semantics in the contract.

rationale: The contract covers most of the population, but two endpoints with undefined replay semantics are exactly the absences the completeness bar exists to catch.
